Gherkin Specs

RegenTribes living specifications

← All Specs

AI Agent Paradigm for Regenerative Communities

As a community building on the AI agent paradigm I want systems that take high-level goals and execute complex multi-step plans So that autonomous action delivers measurable production value
Scenario Terminal-based agents lead the market
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
GivenRust-based tools (DeepSeek-TUI, jcode, Warp) lead the terminal battleground
Whenagents operate through terminal interfaces
Thenlow-latency, high-throughput interaction occurs
Andthe community adopts terminal-native agent patterns
Scenario Agent skills encode institutional knowledge
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
GivenSKILL.md files encode practices for AI coding assistants
Whena new agent joins the community
Thenit reads relevant SKILL.md files
Andexecutes with community-aligned behavior from first interaction
Andinstitutional knowledge remains portable across agent implementations
Scenario MCP standardizes tool integration
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
GivenModel Context Protocol connects agents to external tools
Whena community agent needs to access external services
ThenMCP provides standardized connection without custom integration
Andtool availability expands without agent code changes
Andthe protocol enables agent interoperability across the community
Scenario Tight feedback loops enable proof-of-regeneration
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
Givenfinancial AI agents (TradingAgents, dexter) represent the leading vertical
Whenautonomous AI agents deliver production value
Thenmeasurable feedback enables continuous improvement
Andproof-of-regeneration creates real-world ecological verification before rewards unlock
Andthe same feedback pattern applies to regenerative community metrics
Scenario Compiled corpora replace manual indexing
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
GivenKarpathy's LLM wiki pattern applies to community knowledge
Whenthe system builds a persistent wiki from documents
Thengraph relevance and vector search operate together
AndLouvain community detection identifies knowledge clusters
AndDeep Research navigates the corpus without manual structure
Scenario AI agents are as foundational to 2030s as microservices to 2010s
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
Giventhe infrastructure layer is being built now (MCP, agent skills, terminal agents, orchestration)
Whenthe community builds on top of this layer
Thenregenerative systems leverage the dominant software paradigm of the era
Andthe community avoids building alongside the paradigm rather than on top of it
Scenario Autonomous execution delivers measurable value
Given18 of 30 trending GitHub projects are agent-related in May 2026
AndGitHub reached 4.3 million AI repositories in 2025 (178% increase from 2024)
AndMCP has become essential infrastructure, donated to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation
Andterminal has re-emerged as the primary AI battleground
Giventask decomposition, tool selection, context management, and outcome verification are automated
Whena community member sets a high-level goal
Thenthe full loop from goal to result executes with minimal human intervention
Andmeasurable outcomes are verified automatically
Andthe agent paradigm solves the fundamental coordination problem previous architectures could not

Generated from wiki synthesis · validated with ghokin · deployed via GitHub Actions
